case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. AMERICAN BANKERS INS. CO et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN BANKERS INS. CO BAIL BONDS OF AMERICA $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,080.00
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
STATE REIMBURSEMENT FOR $80.00 FILING FEE(6103.5 GOV.CODE) DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN BANKERS INS. CO BAIL BONDS OF AMERICA
